# Auto-generated rule: quality-gate-wrapper-needs-large-output-buffer-and-env-isolation

Full-gate wrapper tests can fail for harness reasons when verbose npm test output exceeds the default execSync buffer or when outer gate environment variables leak into nested gate runs.

## Evidence
Wave 3 Full Gate retries exposed maxBuffer overflow and inherited TYPECHECK_CMD/TEST_CMD/LINT_CMD/FILES/SESSION_START_REF; runCheck now uses a larger buffer and gate tests clear inherited gate env vars.
